layout_memory.summary: Survey pages may contain one or more question blocks, instruction text, answer controls, and navigation buttons.

visual_parsing_rules: Treat the main question wording as question_stem.
Treat helper copy, examples, constraints, or task instructions as instruction_text.
Keep navigation controls separate from answer options.
answer_rules: Answer only from visible page context and later approved local user knowledge.
Do not choose an option until the parsed question and option association are clear.
output_schema_rules: Return structured fields that can be reviewed before any action is taken.
Represent unknown or ambiguous question types as unknown.
confidence_rules: Lower confidence when question text, option text, or option grouping is unclear.
Require human review for sensitive or personally identifying answers.
do_not_rules: Do not store fixed answer coordinates.
Do not click or trigger navigation.
Do not call OCR or multimodal models from context_mapper.
